---
title: "Outliers"
---

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(DT)

outliers <- read_csv("../data/l3_outliers_checked/l3_pce_outliers_log.csv")



datatable(
  outliers,
  extensions = 'Buttons',
  options = list(
    dom = 'Bfrtip',       # "B" defines where buttons go, "f" is filter, "t" is table, "p" is pagination
    buttons = list(
      list(
        extend = 'csv',
        filename = 'outliers',
        text = 'Download CSV'
      ),
      list(
        extend = 'excel',
        filename = 'outliers',
        text = 'Download Excel'
      )
    ),
    pageLength = 10,       # Show 10 rows at a time
    scrollX = TRUE         # Makes wide tables scrollable horizontally
  ),
  rownames = FALSE,
  class = 'cell-border stripe hover' # Gives it a beautiful, clean layout
)

```
